title: CrowdStrike Intelligence Briefing
description: Daily CrowdStrike intelligence briefing with news, product updates, competitive landscape, and a financial snapshot.

news.title: Q1 FY2027 earnings date set
news.desc: CrowdStrike will report fiscal Q1 2027 results (quarter ended April 30, 2026) after market close on Wednesday, June 3, 2026.

news.title: Named a Leader in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Endpoint Protection
news.desc: CrowdStrike was recognized as a Leader for the seventh consecutive time.

news.title: Project QuiltWorks expands with cyber insurance leaders
news.desc: The initiative grows to help combat financial exposure to frontier AI risk alongside cyber insurance industry partners.

news.title: Leader and Fast Mover in 2026 GigaOm Radar for ITDR
news.desc: CrowdStrike earned perfect 5/5 scores across key criteria in identity threat detection and response.

news.title: New integration with Claude's Compliance API
news.desc: Brings Claude activity into the Falcon platform for unified detection, response, and governance across enterprise AI usage.

news.title: 2026 Americas Partner of the Year Awards announced
news.desc: Winners recognized at the Americas Partner Symposium for driving growth with the Falcon platform.

news.title: Falcon OverWatch for Defender launched
news.desc: Extends CrowdStrike's managed threat hunting to Microsoft Endpoint customers.

products.title: Falcon Platform Spring '26 Release
products.desc: Adds AI-native threat detection and governance across endpoints, cloud, browser, identity, and SaaS, plus an Agentic SOC transformation with Next-Gen SIEM, Agentic MDR, and the AgentWorks custom agent builder.

products.title: Falcon Data Security
products.desc: Discovers, classifies, and stops data theft in real time across the agentic enterprise, with AI-powered classification and GenAI data-leak protection for managed and unmanaged tools.

products.title: AI Agent Security suite
products.desc: Introduces EDR AI Runtime Protection, Shadow AI Discovery, and AIDR for Endpoint — extending to Microsoft Copilot, Salesforce Agentforce, and ChatGPT Enterprise.

products.title: Cloud Risk Engine & Application Explorer
products.desc: Links cloud exposures to adversary tactics and provides integrated visibility across applications and supporting cloud systems.

products.title: Browser security via Seraphic acquisition
products.desc: The January 2026 acquisition of Seraphic Security brings runtime protection directly into the browser.

competitors.name: SentinelOne
competitors.strength: Closest feature-level rival; perfect MITRE ATT&CK detection/protection results; AI-native positioning
competitors.advantage: Larger scale, broader unified platform, stronger brand and MDR ecosystem

competitors.name: Microsoft Defender
competitors.strength: Bundled cost advantage for M365 E5 customers; detection efficacy now competes directly with Falcon
competitors.advantage: Best-of-breed depth, cross-platform coverage, and dedicated threat hunting (OverWatch)

competitors.name: Palo Alto Cortex XDR
competitors.strength: Tight integration with Palo Alto firewalls for network-endpoint correlation
competitors.advantage: Stronger standalone EDR; broader agentic platform; not dependent on network stack

competitors.name: Trend Micro / Sophos
competitors.advantage: Superior enterprise scale, AI/agentic innovation, and analyst leadership

footer: Generated from public web sources for internal competitive-intelligence use.
